name: Praline Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs, granulated sugar, and margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350°F, 10 minutes.
2. In a separate bowl, combine cream cheese, brown sugar, and flour. Mix until well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in vanilla.
4. Stir in chopped pecans.
5. Pour the mixture over the crust.
6. Bake at 450°F, 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 250°F and continue baking an additional 30 minutes.
7. Loosen cake from rim of pan; cool before removing rim of pan. Chill.
8. Brush with maple syrup; top with pecan halves.
